posts.author: cbragg (Colin Bragg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all, hopefully this is ok to post here, I’m not selling anything.

I have just created a Monday.com data connector for Google Looker to dynamically pull board data items, sub-items, and all update comments for dashboarding. I am offering it completely free for business and personal use. I’m not in the business of selling software.

For those comfortable with creating Google Apps Scripts, you can find my open-source project here: GitHub - braggcolin/monday-looker-studio-connector: A free, open-source Looker Studio community connector for Monday.com. Dynamically connects any Monday.com board to Looker Studio without any hardcoding or configuration beyond your API key and board ID. · GitHub, and I would love your feedback. For those who are less comfortable, I have published it to the Google Marketplace (again, entirely free) and hope to have my submission approved in the next 2-3 weeks.
